## Checklist

- [ ] The change is tied to a GitHub Issue.
- [ ] OpenKoda upstream authorship is not misrepresented.
- [ ] Secrets, keys, passwords, tokens, and personal information are not included.
- [ ] Verification evidence is included or the reason for omission is explained.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
